<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.6 Chrome/144.0.7559.236 Electron/40.8.4 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6" scale="1" border="5"> <diagram name="Analytics Workflow" id="fig0102"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="842" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1A5276;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1A5276;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;arcSize=20;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="1. Define the question" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="10" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;" value="Translate the business need into
a specific analytical question" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="200" x="15" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#5D6D7E;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="20"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1A5276;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1A5276;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;arcSize=20;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="2. Prepare and clean" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="660" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="30" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;" value="Resolve missing values, duplicates,
inconsistent formatting" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="200" x="15" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="35" edge="1" parent="1" source="30" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#5D6D7E;strokeWidth=1.5;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="40"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="40" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#17A589;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#17A589;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;arcSize=20;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="4. detect anomalies" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="200" x="15" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45" edge="1" parent="1" source="40" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#5D6D7E;strokeWidth=1.5;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="50"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="50" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#17A589;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#17A589;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;arcSize=20;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="5. Visualize and present" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="350" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="51" parent="50" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;" value="Charts, dashboards, interactive
reports for stakeholders" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="200" x="15" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="55" edge="1" parent="1" source="50" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#5D6D7E;strokeWidth=1.5;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="60"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="60" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F39C12;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#F39C12;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;arcSize=20;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="6. and reports to decision makers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="200" x="15" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="70" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#5D6D7E;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="Chapters 2-3 address stages 1-2. Chapters 4-12 address stages 3-4. Chapters 13-16 address stage 5. All chapters practice stage 6." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="640" x="160" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
